title: Ultragenyx’s gene therapy hits key endpoint in Phase 3 trial for blood ammonia disease
summary: Ultragenyx said its gene therapy candidate for a rare metabolic disease has hit one of two primary endpoints in a late-stage study. The drug is being tested in 37 people with ornithine transcarbamylase deficiency, a ...
cgt_reason: Gene therapy Phase 3 trial for rare disease

title: Sana sees 14-month insulin production for transplanted islet therapy in single Type 1 diabetes patient
summary: In a 14-month follow-up, Sana Biotechnology has found that its investigational allogeneic cell therapy continued to produce insulin for one patient with Type 1 diabetes, with no safety concerns reported.
cgt_reason: Allogeneic cell therapy for Type 1 diabetes
